title: Carnivorial
description: A Mod with new and challenging Mobs for the game
body:
This World, is filled with Dangerous Creatures, roaming around only to find you. Try to fight them alone and you are going to die. The World is dangerous.

Whaidak, The lonely traveler

 

 

This is Carnivorial, our first mod in 2024.

A Mod originally developed by the Blackstone Studio Team for the Youtube Contentcreator SwiftKo, but now you are able to play it too.

 

Mob Classes
Elementals:

Grue:

A Void Creature lurking around in the Dark depths of the Minecraft Caves. Because the Grue is only made of particles and the pure darkness of the Void, it cant be hit with Arrows. Although it looks very scary, it is not hard to beat. In fact, it deals about 2-3 Damage per Attack and has only 10 HP

Spiggan:

Even though they look quite similar to Scarecrows, they are not. The Spiggans love the nature and are very hard to see when not triggering them by breaking ferns or grass. A Villager Philosopher once wrote about them "The Spiggans never want to fight you. The Behave similar to Ents, but a little more agressive."

 

Trolls:

There are three different types of Trolls. The normal Trolls, The Troll Spearwarriors and the TNTTs (be carefull when killing the last one).


 

This Mod also features a Miniboss, that can only be summoned when lightning Srikes within the hot Enviroment of the Deserts. Before fighting him always pack a bunch of arrows. And dont get to confident because of his little damage, because if you dont watch closely enough, your live might be over before you can even blink.

 

 

This Mod was in Early Access on our Discord Server which you can join by clicking here. The Server is a great place to learn about new Mods and maybe even get early access on new Updates for Carnivorial and others

 

You are free to use this mod in Mopacks
